# Run unit tests and generate coverage for SonarQube
- task: DotNetCoreCLI@2
  displayName: 'Run unit tests with coverage'
  inputs:
    command: 'test'
    projects: '$(testProjects)'
    arguments: '--configuration $(buildConfiguration) --no-build --logger trx --results-directory "$(testResultsDir)" --collect:"XPlat Code Coverage" -- DataCollectionRunSettings.DataCollectors.DataCollector.Configuration.Format=opencover'
    publishTestResults: false

Generate unit test coverage for SonarQube PR analysis
